name: cache layer: --cache-strategy=metadata uses mtime+size (faster), content hashes when omitted
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/f.js" --cache --cache-strategy metadata --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" --report-format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"cache_strategy":"metadata"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
